strategies.name: Graceful Restart
strategies.description: Kill process via PID on port, wait 1.5s, spawn fresh

strategies.name: Port Cleanup Restart
strategies.description: Kill all processes on port, wait 3s for full cleanup, then spawn

strategies.name: Delayed Restart
strategies.description: Wait 5s for resources to free, then start with clean state

strategies.name: Delegate to Local LLM
strategies.description: Use qwen2.5:14b to analyze task requirements and produce output

strategies.name: Invoke Sherpa
strategies.description: Delegate task to the appropriate sherpa script

strategies.name: Split Task
strategies.description: Break a failed task into 2-3 smaller sub-tasks and retry each

strategies.name: Reduce Scope
strategies.description: Attempt a simpler version of the task (MVP approach)

strategies.name: Escalate via WhatsApp
strategies.description: Send PM a detailed failure report with attempted strategies and LLM analysis
